title: Bridge Essay: Metacognition and mentalizing are associated with distinct neural representation

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-monitoring, metacognitive awareness, prefrontal-parietal insight circuits.

**Metacognition and mentalizing are associated with distinct neural representations of decision uncertainty.**. PLoS Biol.. PMID: 35559898. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3001301. Metacognition and mentalizing are both associated with meta-level mental state representations. Conventionally, metacognition refers to monitoring one'sown cognitive processes, while mentalizing refers to monitoring others' cognitive processes. However, this self-other dichotomy is insufficient to delineate the 2 high-level mental processes.
